title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl to v1.2.0
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl (github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl)</summary>

### [`v1.2.0`](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/releases/tag/v1.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0)

#### What's Changed

-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.49.0 to 1.50.2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/107](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/107)
-   readme: add logo for checkpointctl by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/108](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/108)
-   docs: add logo file by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/109](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/109)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.50.2 to 1.51.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/110](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/110)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.7.0 to 1.8.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/111](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/111)
-   tree: skip empty env variables branch by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/114](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/114)
-   Extend inspect output format with json by [@​Parthiba-Hazra](https://togithub.com/Parthiba-Hazra) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/113](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/113)
-   test: add e2e test for json format by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/116](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/116)
-   Refactor: Split commands into separate package by [@​shikharish](https://togithub.com/shikharish) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/117](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/117)
-   make: generate auto-completion files by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/118](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/118)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.51.0 to 1.52.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/119](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/119)
-   Handle time stamps from containerd checkpoint archives by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/120](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/120)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/121](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/121)
-   Add support for list command to get the list of container checkpoints by [@​Parthiba-Hazra](https://togithub.com/Parthiba-Hazra) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/115](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/115)
-   Simplified 'list' command code by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/122](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/122)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.52.0 to 1.53.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/124](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/124)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v7 from 7.0.0 to 7.1.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/123](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/123)
-   docs: fix podman link in README by [@​mayank-02](https://togithub.com/mayank-02) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/129](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/129)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.53.0 to 1.54.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/131](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/131)
-   Run `make vendor` to update dependencies due to go version change by [@​Parthiba-Hazra](https://togithub.com/Parthiba-Hazra) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/133](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/133)
-   Add annotations for creating OCI images from checkpoint archives by [@​Parthiba-Hazra](https://togithub.com/Parthiba-Hazra) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/127](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/127)
-   Create new release v1.2.0 by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/134](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/134)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​Parthiba-Hazra](https://togithub.com/Parthiba-Hazra) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/113](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/113)
-   [@​shikharish](https://togithub.com/shikharish) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/117](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/117)
-   [@​mayank-02](https://togithub.com/mayank-02) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/129](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/129)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0

</details>
